snippet.title: Surmedani - Bajre Da Sitta (Audio) | Ammy Virk | Tania | Jyotica Tangri| Noor Chahal | Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
Surmedani - Bajre Da Sitta (Audio) | Ammy Virk | Tania | Jyotica Tangri| Noor Chahal | Punjabi Song

Stay updated with Super Hit Punjabi Music Videos, Subscribe to the below link.
https://www.youtube.com/TipsPunjabi

Song Credits:
Singer: Jyotica Tangri & Noor Chahal
Music Director: Avvy Sra
Lyrics: Harmanjit
Music Assistant & Sound Designer: Jaydden
Mix & Master: Yograj Singh & Suyash Singh
Choreographer: Direction Team
Music Label: Tips Industries Ltd. (Tips Punjabi)

Movie Credits - 
Banner - Shri Narotam Ji Studios, Tips Films Limited & Ammy Virk Production
Movie - Bajre Da Sitta
Written & Directed By - Jass Grewal
Starcast: Ammy Virk, Tania, Guggu Gill, Noor Chahal, Nirmal Rishi, BN Sharma, Hobby Dhaliwal, Parkash Gadhu, Tarsem Paul, Gurpreet Bhangu, Rupinder Rupi, Seema Kaushal, Parminder Barnala, Satwant Kaur, Aakanksha  Sareen,  Verma Malik, Harman Dhaliwal, Gunveen Manchanda
Produced by: Ankit Vijan, Navdeep Narula, Girish Kumar, Navneet Virk,  Orion Studios
Co-Produced By: Kiran Yadav
DOP: Sana Ravi Kumar  
Visual Promotion & Editor: Pawan Kaith   
Music:  Jaidev Kumar,  Avvy Sra 
Executive  Producer:  Varun  Jhamb, Mandeep Singh Taunque
Lyricist:  Veet Baljit,  Harmanjit, Bir Singh, Jass Grewal, Vijay Vivek, Verma Malik, Jassi Pakhi
Background Score: Jaidev Kumar
Art Director: Rommy  Arts
Costume Designer: Roma Sharma
Associate Director: Jimmy Gidderbaha
Choreographer: Tushar Kalia & Direction Team
Singers:  Ammy Virk, Jyotica Tangri, Noor Chahal, Sargi Maan
DI: Afterplay Studios (Maddy)
DI Colorist:  Uttam Kumar Pandey
Line Producer: Nitin Gupta & Chanpreet Singh Dhanoa
Sound Design: Rabab Studios
Mixing: Akshay Bragta
Motion Graphic Artist: Amrit Kaur
Music on: Tips Industries Ltd. (Tips Punjabi)
Post-production: Rabab Music Productions Pvt. Ltd.
Worldwide Distribution By: Aanandah Pictures
Flute By: flutepreet

Lyrics:
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….
Ohdi paerr chaal suna jad jad v
Maithon bolya na janda ik vaak v
Oh v maukke di nazakat pachaan ke
Sayeon chup kar janda odon aap v
Jado akhiyan da noor howe saawein
Dupatta siron nhiyon lahida 
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani….

Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani….

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani….

snippet.title: Shilabati | Official Full Video |  New Sambalpuri Song | Jayshree | Alex | Karan| Sanju | Kamalesh
snippet.description:
Shilabati | Official Full Video |  New Sambalpuri Song | Jayshree Sarngi | Alex Bawa | Karan Kumar | Sanju Mohanty | Kamaleshh Chakrabortyy | Dilip Singh |
#shilabati #officialfullvideo #newsambalpurisong #jayshreesarangi #alexbawa #karankumar #sanjumohanty #kamaleshchakraborty #dilipsingh 

🎬Song - Shilabati
🎬Producer - Durgaram Choudhary 
🎬Direction & Choreography - Karan Kumar
🎬Asst Choreographer - Sanju
🎬Starring - Jayshree Sarangi, Alex Bawa & Karan Kumar
🎬Dop/Edit/Di - Appu Behera
🎬Asst DOP - Ritesh 
🎬Traveling - Amulya 
🎬Producution Head - Devit Harry
🎬Production Manager - Shibanand Bhitria
🎬Dance Group - Gurukul Dance Academy
🎬Mackup - Sagar
🎬Costume - BBRS
🎬Light - Rajesh 
🎬Publicity Design - A One Desing
🎬Special Thanks To Manaharpali Bio Fuels Development Foundation

Audio Credit :-
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Singer - Sanju Mohanty 
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Rap & Lyrics - Alex Bawa   
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Music - Kamaleshh Chakrabortyy
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Lyrics - Dilip Singh
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Mpc - Anirudhha Dhala (Babu Da)
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Vst - John Niranjan Pandey
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Rhythm - Nibash Jackson, Pintu Naik, Sunil Bibhar, Kanha
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Mixing & Master - MRR Studio ( MRR.Studio, Cuttack ) 
𝅘𝅥𝅯 Track Recording - RR Studio, Bargarh

🎶𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝓢𝓱𝓲𝓵𝓫𝓪𝓽𝓲 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 :
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/26214778978192194
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/0cqxzUhVbm2a2UadtgAfmS?si=05f9dc2f015f44b3
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/shilabati-feat-alex-bawa
YouTube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=qIu2dTgT7j0
JioSaavn :https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/shilabati/vr,-9DF1lCg_
Amazon Music - https://tinyurl.com/2pw465nr
Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/us/album/shilabati-feat-alex-bawa-single/1893058907

Full Song Lyrics :-
DHAGA
A Landar Fandar Panch Pandar
Aage Pachha Fida Bandar
Chere Mera Kecher Kachar
Sabu Jakar Hee... 

MUKHDA
Buli Gale Bajara 
Lachku Thile Kamar
Dhangra Suhla Satara 
Haiya Haiya Haiya Re..... 

Buli Gale Bajara 
Lachku Thile Kamar
Dhangra Suhla Satara 
Haiya Haiya Haiya Re..... 

1st CROSS
Monika Madhuri 
Cinema Bali Turi
Mor Panate Demi Tate Khuchi Re....

MELODY
A Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

2nd CROSS
Mor Hasi Madhumati 
Risimi Chabiri Chati re 

MELODY
A Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

RAP part
Malki Malki Anta Dhana Tor 
Chat Patia Katha
Hirni Chali Mann Jaluchhe 
Hei Gali Na Atha
Beni Jhule Laplapa Tor 
Aenkh Bhi Marsi Chot
A Dekh, Bawa Pura Bolangiria 
Udei Deba Tor Hoss

Shila Rani Shila Bati Tui
Dil Cherei Kari 
Muhu Mudi Desu
Anta Halei Kari
Mann Mari Desu
Dekhi Tate Dil Thi Bajsi Gaana 
Gaale Chumi Deti
Lade Gelhe Chahara Diuchhu 
Dhana Rani Shila Bati 
A... Rani Shilabati

1st Antra
Ha.... Ha .. Ha... 
A Mor Mahu Mahulia Ankhi 
Dekhi Tor Rashia Duluke Chhati
Chehera Ukia 
Jhaka Maka Jhala Mala Dibri Bati

Haye Mor Makhmali Gura Dihi
A Guta Chaule Gadhichhe Dihi
Mahani Mantara.... 
Guri Gaale Jhalaa Mala Sundri Kain.. 

Mitha Burolati
Mor Chahani Chandara Bati re

Mui Andhare Bijili Bati Re...
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 
Mui Shila Mui Shila 
Mui Shila Rani Shila Bati Re 

Chorus
Aahaa Aahaa Aahaa Aahaa Aa...... 

2nd Antra
Haa... Haa... Haa... Ha.....
Haye Mor Kanli Khiali Mana
Juba.... Bayasa Mor Chhana Chhana
Kahari Mahake... 
Pachhe Pachhe Parjapati 
Dhaai Aasena

Please Photu Gute Hema Bali
Emago Pilankar Kete Galahi
Laguchhe Laja Maa... 
Gada Gada Hada Hada 
Dhangra Khali

Sabhe Kahu Achhan
Muin Puara Natural Beauty Re... 

MALE part
A Tui Andhare Bijili Bati Re

Chorus
Tui Shila Ha 
Tui Shila Isss
Tui Shila Rani Shila bati Re

Female
Mui Sapane Aayesi Raati Re 

Chorus
Tui Shila
Tui Shila 
Tui Shila Rani Shilabati Re... 
Hettt....
